{{CargoOrgan
|name=MR Cell
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10881
|idx=88
|description=Tuned to Earth's magnetic field, these cells trigger bizarre phenomena when in harmony with their host’s magnetism. Masters of the art can weaponize them in surreal, unpredictable ways.
|skill=
|hp=1776
|def=181
|atk=305
|rush=182
|gene1=Per 20 Wonder Fungi used, {race} HP +500
Wonder Fungi Eaten: 60/60
|gene2=Restore 600 HP each round
|gene3=CRIT DMG REDUC +7.5%
|gene4=Per 10 Sim Core LVL, {race} RUSH +5
Sim Core: 500/500
|gene5=Demon God Cabin, deployable robots +3
|gene7=Demon God Cabin, deployable robots +9 (Awakened)
|}}
